name: property managers processing 5–15 utility bills/month tool
description: For property managers processing 5–15 utility bills/month, inconsistent tracking causes budget overruns. We aggregate utility bills and generate variance reports instead of manual tracking in spreadsheets.
problem_solved: Inconsistent tracking of utility expenses leads to budget overruns.

locked_fields.primary_problem: Inconsistent tracking of utility expenses leads to budget overruns.
